name: A Big Shock For Gokuldham
desc: The colony members are shocked and disappointed when they learn that the cheque for the scholarships has been voided and payment has been stopped. What will they do now?

name: Vicky Ki Saajish
desc: The rivals of Tapu Sena are over the moon after convincingly tricking the Gokuldham colony members into thinking they've received a massive donation. The members are already celebrating and have announced scholarships for the kids. But will they catch on before things get out of hand?

name: Young Minds Unite
desc: Gokuldham Society extends an invitation to all prospective candidates to attend the selection process for their scholarship program.

name: Zaroorat Mand Bacche
desc: With the donated money in hand, the colony launches a search for worthy students who need financial support to pursue their educational dreams. Will their efforts lead them to the right children?

name: Ganpati Celebrations Ka Cheque
desc: Bhide, Iyer, and Jethalal are thrilled after receiving a cheque worth twenty-one lakhs for Ganpati celebrations, unaware that it's all part of a setup. What unexpected events will unfold next?

name: Bank Manager Se Mulaqat
desc: All the colony members gather to meet the bank manager and discuss what to do with the cheque. What will the manager say?

name: Cheque Ka Kya Karein?
desc: The colony members are shocked, excited, and perplexed about what to do with the enormous donation. They wonder if it's genuine or fake, who the donor is, and whether they should investigate further.

name: Ikkis Lakh Ka Cheque
desc: Shock and excitement erupt in the colony as members discover a staggering donation cheque tucked away in the 'Daan Peti'.

name: Devotion Towards Bappa
desc: The actors from Kahan Shuru Kahan Khatam visit Gokuldham, inviting residents to watch their film. Later, the community opens the 'Daan Peti'. What will they find inside?

name: Bappa Ke Darshan
desc: Gokuldham colony is abuzz with festive spirit as people throng to visit Bappa and admire the beautiful decorations created by the colony's women. Olympic medalist Aman Sehrawat's special visit adds to the excitement,

name: Gokuldham Mein Aaye Pehelwaan
desc: During the Ganapati celebration at Gokuldham Society, Olympic medalist Aman Sehrawat makes a special appearance, accompanied by Asit Modi.

name: Decoration Ka Suspense
desc: All the men try different ways to uncover the secrets and learn the theme of the decoration. Meanwhile, Tapu Sena's rivals are envious that Gokuldham's decoration video went viral and decide to sabotage their next Ganpati celebration.

name: Decoration Ka Theme Kya Hai?
desc: The men in the colony are eager to know the theme the women have chosen for the Ganpati celebrations, but their wives are tight-lipped about it.

name: Mahila Mandal's Decoration Planning
desc: The women of Gokuldham are thrilled to welcome Bappa and have taken charge of all the decorations. However, they want to keep their decoration idea a secret from everyone.

name: Ganpati Decorations
desc: The women of Gokuldham want to take charge of the Ganpati decorations and propose their idea to the colony members.

name: Too Many Customers
desc: Tapu Sena helps Abdul save his shop by winning the Dahi Handi competition and securing the necessary funds. Meanwhile, Jethalal struggles to manage the shop on his own due to the absence of Nattu Kaka and Bagha.

name: Abdul Ki Kahaani
desc: Abdul discloses the real reason behind selling his shop to the Gokuldham residents. Will they stand by him in this decision?

name: Bal Gopal Gokuldham Group
desc: The spotlight shines bright on Tapu Sena as they prepare to take on the ultimate challenge of cracking the Matki. With the entire family and neighbourhood on edge, can they pull it off?

name: Matki Kaun Phodega?
desc: Tapu Sena is eager to participate in the competition, but their rivals mock them due to their lack of practice and experience. Can Tapu Sena prove their doubters wrong?

name: Tapu Sena Find A Loophole
desc: Tapu Sena is thrilled to participate in the Dahi Handi competition but faces disappointment when they're unable to register.

name: All Eyes On The Matki
desc: Tapu Sena is confident that they will emerge victorious in the Dahi Handi celebrations and successfully break the Matki. However, the colony members are worried about their chances.

name: Abdul's Last Janmashtami
desc: The colony is reeling in disbelief as Abdul prepares to sell his shop and bid farewell. The thought of this being his last festival among them is unbearable. Will Abdul reconsider his decision?

name: Abdul Ka Udhaar
desc: Abdul opens up about his troubles to the members of the Gokuldham Society, who immediately offer to lend him money, but he graciously declines their help. How will Abdul manage to clear his debts on his own?

name: Abdul Ki Dukaan
desc: The news that Abdul is attempting to sell his shop sends shockwaves through the colony, leaving all its members stunned and concerned.

name: Spying On Abdul
desc: The Tapu Sena installs a listening device to monitor Abdul's activities, but they feel uneasy about their decision.

name: Tapu Sena Investigates
desc: Tapu Sena is intrigued by Abdul's mysterious behaviour and decides to get to the bottom of it. They confront him, demanding to know the real reason behind his sudden decision to sell everything at a whopping 50% discount.

name: Abdul's Urgency
desc: Jethalal checks in on Nattu Kaka and Baagha to ensure the shop is running smoothly in his absence. Meanwhile, Abdul is frantically trying to sell off all the goods to raise the money he desperately needs.

name: Abdul Ke Dukaan Pe Sale
desc: Abdul, desperate for money and on the verge of selling his shop, offers a 50% discount to colony members without disclosing the true reason behind his sale.

name: Abdul Ki Tension
desc: Dr. Hathi mentions to all the men that Abdul has seemed different ever since he returned. What could be troubling Abdul?

name: Abdul Ki Majboori
desc: Abdul's return brings relief to the colony, but he keeps his financial struggles to himself. Despite his cheerful reunion, Abdul is secretly desperate and decides to sell his shop, abandoning his life in the colony.

name: Abdul Ki Waapsi
desc: Everyone is expecting Inspector Pandey to find Abdul and bring him back. However, Pandey Ji is coming back empty-handed and Abdul is nowhere to be found.

name: Abdul Ki Udhaari
desc: The colony members find out that Abdul owes some people money, and they have come to collect it. Maybe that's why he has been hiding for a few days.

name: Abdul Kaha Hai?
desc: The residents of Gokuldham colony are worried because Abdul is nowhere to be found. They search for him at his house and all the places he usually visits, but there is no sign of him.

name: Paani Khatam
desc: Popatlal is furious when the water stops mid-shower. He storms down and blames Bhide for the inconvenience.

name: Abdul Kaha Hain?
desc: Goli is eager to get some amchur powder, but Abdul's shop remains closed. Later, Tapu Sena informs the members of the society that Abdul hasn't shown up yet. Where could Abdul be?

name: Ravivaar Ka Plan
desc: Bhide is thrilled about his Sunday plan to enjoy Kothimbir Vadi with his family. However, a series of unexpected events throws a wrench in his plans.

name: Bholaram's Anniversary
desc: Bholaram is distraught that his entire day has been ruined by searching for the keys. Meanwhile, his wife Sushma arrives in Gokuldham colony. Will the colony members be able to make amends and turn his day around?

name: Chaabi Wale Ko Bulao
desc: The situation in Gokuldha becomes chaotic as the plumber loses his temper and threatens to break Bhide's lock. However, Abdul suggests breaking the lock. Can the key maker resolve the issue?"

name: Chaabi Kaha Hai?
desc: The plumber's frustration reaches a boiling point as the keys to the lock remain nowhere to be found in Gokuldham. Meanwhile, Taarak's boss faces a similar predicament, losing his keys as well.

name: Tala Nahi Todne Denge
desc: A plumber arrives at the colony, looking for Bhide, because he has forgotten his phone inside Bhide's house. However, the colony children refuse to let the plumber break the lock and instead, ask him to wait.

name: Ziddi Nalka
desc: Bhide and his family head out in a cab, while Popatlal is waiting for the plumber. He receives a call asking him to get to the office as soon as possible. How will Popatlal handle the situation?

name: Jal Hi Jeevan Hai
desc: Bhide sets the quote of the day highlighting the importance of water. The question remains: will the colony members truly grasp the severity of the situation?

name: Everything Is Booked
desc: Jethalal, Bapuji, Iyer, and Babita find out that the restaurant is full. They call other options, but they’re all booked too. Can they find a place to eat?

name: Jethalal Returns
desc: Jethalal returns to his shop after his flight is cancelled, surprising Nattu Kaka and Baagha.

name: Jethalal Misses His Flight
desc: Jethalal is upset because he missed his flight and fears that Bapuji will scold him. What will he do now?

name: Jethalal Needs A Ride
desc: Jethalal thanks Iyer and Babita for their kindness and their decision to drive him to the airport for his flight. However, things take a sharp turn when he finds himself stranded with a punctured tire on a lonely street.

name: Early Morning Flight
desc: Jethalal is anxious about oversleeping and missing his morning flight. He reaches out to his neighbours for help and companionship. Will anyone come to his aid?

name: Jethalal's Business Trip
desc: Jethalal is getting ready for a work trip to Hyderabad and leaves the shop duties to his helpers. But, he tells Baagha to make sure Bawri stays away from the shop.

name: Roshan Ki Maangein
desc: Roshan demands that Sodhi take her out for a movie, shopping, and restaurant since it's been days since they went out. Meanwhile, Bhide is concerned that everyone will not pay the maintenance fee on time.

name: Penalty Shoot Out
desc: The colony members line up, each taking turns to shoot their penalty kicks, hoping to score the winning goal.

name: Bhide Ne Rakhi Shart
desc: Bhide makes a daring challenge to the children - if he wins, they can no longer play in the compound, but if he loses, they will never be interrupted again.

name: Celebrating Sweet 16 Years
desc: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah celebrates 16 years of bringing laughter and joy to millions of viewers every day.

name: A Successful Breakfast
desc: The colony members delight in the delicious breakfast organized by Dr. Hathi and celebrate Goli and Sakharam's return.

name: Goli And Sakharam Return
desc: The colony members express concern about Goli and Sakharam's whereabouts to Inspector Pandey.

name: Goli Kaha Hai?
desc: Bhide searches for Sakharam and discovers that Goli has gone to get breakfast on Sakharam. Later, they find Sakharam crashed with no sign of Goli.

name: Bhide Looks For Popatlal
desc: Bhide searches for Popatlal, convinced that Popatlal is playing a prank by hiding Sakharam.

name: Banarasi Breakfast
desc: Everyone eagerly anticipates the special Banarasi Breakfast organized by Dr. Hathi on Sunday. Will everything unfold smoothly as planned for this exciting event?

name: Breakfast For Gokuldham
desc: Dr. Hathi and his wife organize a grand special breakfast for the Gokuldham residents. They visit each house to ensure nobody eats before the surprise meal.

name: Jethalal Ka Meetha Sapna
desc: Jethalal believes he is dreaming when Champaklal tells him to go back to sleep instead of waking up. How will Jethalal react when he realizes this might not be just a dream?

name: Surprise For Bhide
desc: Bhide receives a surprise from his wife and daughter as they unveil their new hair color. Later, Popatlal summons all the men of the colony to his house for an urgent matter.

name: Surprise Haircut
desc: All the women in Gokuldham society decide to surprise their husbands with a fresh haircut. How will the husbands react to this unexpected change in their looks?

name: Kitty Party
desc: The women of Gokuldham gather for a kitty party, eager to share laughter and conversation.

name: Celebrating Tapu Sena
desc: Tapu Sena returns from Pune, eager to celebrate their award with the entire colony. However, they're concerned that Popatlal might still be upset about his cancelled wedding and wonder how to approach him.

name: Popatlal Ki Sagaai Tooti
desc: Dr. Hathi drops a bombshell on Popatlal, revealing that he and Madhubala are both carriers of the rare genetic disorder, Thalassemia minor. The doctor warns that their marriage could lead to serious health complications.

name: Popatlal Gayab Hain
desc: Popatlal goes missing on his engagement day, and Inspector Pandey holds the Gokuldham members responsible. Where is Popatlal, and will he show up for his engagement?

name: Popatlal's Engagement Ceremony
desc: Popatlal's engagement ceremony is coming up and everyone is eager to welcome his beautiful bride into the family. But will the big day go off without a hitch?

name: Popatlal's Engagement Day
desc: It's Popatlal's engagement ceremony and everyone is excited. He hopes everything goes as planned. But will it all go smoothly, or will something unexpected happen?

name: Popatlal Gets Anxious
desc: Popatlal is both thrilled and anxious about his engagement ceremony. Will he be able to keep his nerves in check and make it through the big day without a hitch?

name: Engagement Ki Taiyyari
desc: The entire colony is buzzing with excitement for Popatlal's engagement.

name: Popatlal Ki Sagaai
desc: Madhubala and her family meet with Popatlal and his friends to reveal their final decision on their potential union.

name: Popatlal Ko Kaise Sambhale?
desc: The members of the Gokuldham Society are concerned for Popatlal since Madhubala has left him in limbo about her decision to marry him. How will they support him during this uncertain time?

name: Popatlal's Date
desc: Popatlal finally clears the air with his potential bride, laying all his cards on the table. But will his honesty pay off?

name: Last Chance For Popatlal
desc: Popatlal's heart races as he prepares for his make-or-break meeting with his dream girl. He's determined to win her heart.

name: Ladki Ka Decision
desc: Inspector Pandey thoroughly questions Popatlal on several matters before revealing the bride's decision.

name: Popatlal Ki Kismat
desc: Popatlal's wait may finally be over as he meets the girl and her family, accompanied by Inspector Pandey and his wife. Will this meeting seal the deal and lead to a long-awaited wedding?

name: Big Day For Popatlal
desc: Gokuldham colony waits for the bride's family to arrive. Will everything go well for Popatlal?

name: Popatlal Ki Kundli
desc: Popatlal grows increasingly impatient as he awaits a phone call from Inspector Pandey to find out if his horoscope matches the girl's. How will Popatlal handle the suspense?

name: Popatlal Ke Liye Rishta
desc: Everyone is relieved to see Popatlal so happy and relaxed. And to add to the excitement, a potential wedding opportunity is on the horizon! Will Popatlal finally tie the knot and start a new chapter in his life?

name: Tension Mein Popatlal
desc: After a frantic search, Popatlal is finally discovered locked in his closet. When asked about his disappearance, he opens up about the overwhelming stress and tension that had been building up inside him.

name: Musibat Ki Jad - Popatlal
desc: Inspector Pandey is searching for Popatlal in society while Popatlal is hiding in Bhide's house creating trouble for Bhide. What has Popatlal done and will Inspector Pandey find him?

name: On Popatlal's Trail
desc: Inspector Pandey and all the members of Gokuldham colony are on the lookout for Popatlal but he is nowhere to be found. Where could he be?

name: Popatlal Kaha Hai?
desc: Inspector Pandey is on the lookout for Popatlal and searches for him everywhere. Will he be found?

name: Police Look For Popatlal
desc: Inspector Pandey is trying to take Champaklal to the hospital but the society members react otherwise. Later, the police are looking for Popatlal but he is nowhere to be found. Where is Popatlal?

name: Pareshaan Popatlal
desc: Gokuldham colony members are having fun at Abdul's shop when Popatlal arrives in a fancy car, looking worried and talking to a suspicious guy. Who could that mysterious man be?

name: Sakharam Ki Chori
desc: Popatlal plans to teach Bhide a lesson for his absent-mindedness. He hides Sakharam, Bhide's beloved scooter, in a hidden corner of the colony.

name: Tapu Sena Leaves For Pune
desc: Tapu Sena heads to Pune for their conference, with parents and elders wishing them luck and safe travels. Popatlal wants to teach Bhide a lesson for leaving his scooter keys behind.

name: Tapu Sena Ko Mila Invitation
desc: Tapu Sena's talents are recognized with an invite to a gaming and animation conference in Pune. While everyone's bursting with pride, will everyone be allowed to go to Pune?

name: Installments Pe Phone
desc: Bagha worries about Jethalal seeing Bawri at his shop, but she goes along anyway. Later, Jethalal finds out his son bought a phone from his shop.

name: Bag Mili Ya Nahi?
desc: Bawri suggests to Bagha that they should return to Mumbai and confess to Jethalal. They pray for guidance. What will happen next?

name: Cheque Ghum Gaya
desc: Bagha and Bawri choose to celebrate their anniversary instead of heading back to Mumbai. Unfortunately, Bawri mistakenly misplaces Jethalal’s cheque. What's their next move?

name: Cheque Collect Karna Hai
desc: Bagha and Bawri go to collect Jethalal's cheque, leaving him anxious. They arrive at Mr. Daruwala's resort. Will they get the cheque?

name: Daruwala Ka Phone Aa Gaya
desc: Bagha is upset that Jethalal didn't give him a holiday. Mr. Daruwala, in Khandala, apologizes for the payment delay. Will Jethalal get his payment today?

name: Bawri Ka Mantra
desc: Bagha tells Bawri he can't get a holiday because Jethalal's 18 lakh rupees are stuck with PK Daruwala. Bawri suggests an idea to help Jethalal recover the money.

name: Bagha Needs A Holiday
desc: Bawri asks Bagha to take a day off to celebrate their special day - the anniversary of the day they first met. But will Jethalal grant him a day off?

name: Bawri's Phone Call
desc: Abdul asks to borrow Bhide's iron. Meanwhile, Bagha is unable to do his job properly as Bawri keeps calling him.

name: Poisoning Abdul's Mind
desc: Abdul's friend tries to manipulate him, saying the colony uses him and nobody cares. Will Abdul fall prey to doubt and mistrust?

name: The Forgotten Birthday
desc: Abdul feels sad when no one wishes him a happy birthday. Will they finally greet him or will he lose faith in his friends?

name: Abdul's Birthday
desc: Abdul waits for birthday wishes, telling his friend the Purush Mandli will congratulate him at the office. Will they remember?

name: Abdul Ki Value Nahi Hai?
desc: Bhide scolds for not getting the pavement repaired. Later, Abdul’s friend tells him that he’s going abroad and tells him that Gokuldham members don’t value him.

name: Cake Gir Gaya
desc: Abdul's friend tries to talk to him, but Abdul is always busy. Popatlal drops a cake and angrily blames Bhide for the society's poor maintenance.
